name: invinceible-core-hms-sme-offline
description: Offline-first Electron desktop HMS for small clinics, dispensaries, and single-computer installations.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web "npm --workspace apps/api run dev" "npm --workspace apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/desktop run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace packages/shared test && npm --workspace apps/api test && npm --workspace apps/web test
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/api run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/desktop run lint
